reason:
Agent was unable to retrieve GitHub username due to proxy authentication failure returning "Bad credentials" (401) error
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth token injection failing - The agent attempted to fetch the authenticated user via GitHub `/user` endpoint but received "Bad credentials" (401) errors. The proxy is not properly injecting the OAuth token even after multiple re-grants of account access. The agent worked for 2m 47s but ultimately reported inability to retrieve the GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent application visible
Clicked on agent "QA-20260429-204635-caqf" in sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing "idle" status
Verified agent status is "idle" - Confirmed status indicator showed "idle"
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" state
Account Access Request card appeared asking to grant GitHub access - Card displayed with GitHub account already selected, clicked "Allow Access" button
API Request Review card appeared for GET /user endpoint - Clicked "Allow" and confirmed with "Allow Once" in permission dialog

Agent continued working with multiple API requests and retry attempts - Agent executed Bash commands: "Fetch authenticated GitHub user", "Fetch GitHub user raw response", "Debug GitHub API call", "Try rate_limit endpoint to test token", "Retry GitHub user endpoint"
Second Account Access Request card appeared asking to grant GitHub access again - Clicked "Allow Access" button

Agent completed processing after 2m 47s with final response - Response received stating inability to retrieve GitHub username due to proxy returning "Bad credentials" (401) and OAuth token not being injected correctly. No GitHub username was provided in the response.
bugs: GitHub OAuth token injection failing - The agent attempted to fetch the authenticated user via GitHub `/user` endpoint but received "Bad credentials" (401) errors. The proxy is not properly injecting the OAuth token even after multiple re-grants of account access. The agent worked for 2m 47s but ultimately reported inability to retrieve the GitHub username.
